SEARCH

Uses of Interface
server.control.DomainController

Packages that use DomainController
Package
Description
server.control
 

  • Uses of DomainController in server.control

    Classes in server.control that implement DomainController
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AuthController
    Owns the authentication / registration domain (login, logout, single-login lock, subscriber & guide registration).
    class 
    NotificationController
    Owns the notification domain: listing the logged-in actor's messages and acknowledging them.
    class 
    ParkController
    Owns the park & parameter-change domain: park lookup, the booking-dropdown park list, capacity availability, and the parameter-change request/approve/reject workflow.
    class 
    ReportController
    Owns the reporting domain: the Visits-by-Type and Cancellations reports the department manager runs across the region.
    class 
    ReservationController
    Owns the reservation & waiting-list domain (create/get/update/cancel/list, confirm, join/leave waitlist, accept grab).
    class 
    VisitController
    Owns the visit domain: park entry by reservation, exit, casual walk-ins, and live occupancy.
